caption: Two men are seated indoors in a room with wooden paneling and a rectangular wall feature. The man on the left wears a white traditional garment and a grey patterned cap. The man on the right wears a blue and white traditional garment and a blue cap with a colorful pattern. He wears glasses and is slightly turned toward the other man. Throughout the frames, their positions and expressions remain largely static, though there are subtle shifts in their posture. A "plustv" logo appears in the upper left corner, and a purple banner across the bottom reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a white bar displays "SUBSCRIBE" and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE". In the final frames, a bottom bar appears with "FOLLOW US" and social media icons next to "PLUSTVAFRICA".
